fields.name: ENABLE
fields.description: Global enable for controller activity. When 0, controller activity is quiescent.

fields.name: SOFT_RESET
fields.description: Software-requested synchronous reset of control and status state. Write 1 to request reset behavior; self-clears by implementation policy after being sampled.

fields.name: IRQ_ENABLE
fields.description: Allows irq to assert when BIST completion or failure is latched.

registers.name: MEM_ADDR
registers.description: Memory address register for firmware access. Only bits [5:0] are used to address the 64-word SRAM; upper bits are reserved/ignored.

fields.name: MEMORY_WRITE_DATA
fields.description: Write data to be stored in SRAM.

registers.name: MEM_RDATA
registers.description: Memory read data register. Captures the last software-visible SRAM read data.

fields.name: MEM_WRITE
fields.description: Perform a memory write using MEM_ADDR and MEM_WDATA.

fields.name: MEM_READ
fields.description: Perform a memory read using MEM_ADDR and update MEM_RDATA.

registers.name: BIST_CONTROL
registers.description: BIST control register. A BIST request may also originate from the bist_start top-level input.

fields.name: CLEAR_RESULT
fields.description: Clear latched BIST result and IRQ status.

registers.name: BIST_STATUS
registers.description: BIST status register including the last failing memory address.

fields.name: LAST_FAIL_ADDR
fields.description: Address of the last observed failure. Encoded in bits [8:3] for the 6-bit address value.

registers.name: IRQ_STATUS
registers.description: Latched interrupt status register. Writing 1 to a bit may set or clear per implementation policy only where explicitly defined; preferred clear is via IRQ_CLEAR.

fields.name: CLEAR_BIST_DONE
fields.description: Write one to clear the BIST done interrupt status.

fields.name: CLEAR_BIST_FAIL
fields.description: Write one to clear the BIST fail interrupt status.
